name: Date Drops 2
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 400 degrees. Lightly grease 2 baking sheets.
In a bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
In another large bowl, cream the vegetable shortening and brown sugar until smooth.
Add the egg and sour cream to the mixture; beat until well combined.
Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture; stir until just blended.
Fold in the chopped dates and walnuts.
Drop spoonfuls of dough onto prepared baking sheets, spacing about 1-3/4 inches apart.
Press a walnut into the center of each cookie.
Bake for 8 to 10 minutes, or until lightly browned. Remove from oven and let cool on wire racks.
